"'''Rogue's Gallery'''" was a short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3]]''.

==Plot summary==
[[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] are searching a large [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] on which [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] has told them he senses some presence. They enter a hall filled with many trophies of battle, and approach one another from opposite directions, having split-up and secured any exits from the hall.

Durge is attacked by a deadly combination of baleful life and advanced technology he later learns is named [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. Ventress joins the battle, but she too is eventually bested by this new monster. Returning to his mentor, Tyranus, with the pair of battered bodies, he is told he has passed his test and is ordered to put Durge and Ventress in [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tanks]] to allow them to heal. Dooku then promotes Grievous to the Supreme Commander of the Confederate Army.

==Continuity==
In the contents of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3]]'', the title of "Rogue's Gallery" is printed without the apostrophe.
